options.name: --also-make
options.description:
If project list is specified,
also build projects required by
the list

options.name: --also-make-dependents
options.description:
If project list is specified,
also build projects that depend
on projects on the list

options.name: --batch-mode
options.description:
Run in non-interactive (batch)
mode (disables output color)

options.name: --builder
options.description:
The id of the build strategy to
use

options.name: --strict-checksums
options.description:
Fail the build if checksums don't
match

options.name: --lax-checksums
options.description: Warn if checksums don't match

options.name: --color
options.description:
Defines the color mode of the
output. Supported are 'auto',
'always', 'never'.

options.name: --check-plugin-updates
options.description:
Ineffective, only kept for
backward compatibility

options.name: --define
options.description: Define a user property

options.name: --errors
options.description: Produce execution error messages

options.name: --encrypt-master-password
options.description: Encrypt master security password

options.name: --encrypt-password
options.description: Encrypt server password

options.name: --file
options.description:
Force the use of an alternate POM
file (or directory with pom.xml)

options.name: --fail-at-end
--fail-fast
options.description:
Stop at first failure in
reactorized builds

options.name: --fail-never
options.description:
NEVER fail the build, regardless
of project result

options.name: --global-settings
options.description:
Alternate path for the global
settings file

options.name: --global-toolchains
options.description:
Alternate path for the global
toolchains file

options.name: --help
options.description: Display help information

options.name: --ignore-transitive-repositories
options.description:
If set, Maven will ignore remote
repositories introduced by
transitive dependencies.

options.name: --log-file
options.description:
Log file where all build output
will go (disables output color)

options.name: --legacy-local-repository
options.description:
UNSUPPORTED: Use of this option
will make Maven invocation fail.

options.name: --non-recursive
options.description: Do not recurse into sub-projects

options.name: --no-plugin-registry
options.description: Ineffective, only kept for

options.name: --no-plugin-updates
options.description: Ineffective, only kept for

options.name: --no-snapshot-updates
options.description: Suppress SNAPSHOT updates

options.name: --no-transfer-progress
options.description:
Do not display transfer progress
when downloading or uploading

options.name: --offline
options.description: Work offline

options.name: --activate-profiles
options.description:
Comma-delimited list of profiles
to activate

options.name: --projects
options.description:
Comma-delimited list of specified
reactor projects to build instead
of all projects. A project can be
specified by [groupId]:artifactId
or by its relative path

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Quiet output - only show errors

options.name: --raw-streams
options.description: Ignored (Maven4 option)

options.name: --resume-from
options.description:
Resume reactor from specified
project

options.name: --settings
options.description: Alternate path for the user

options.name: --toolchains
options.description: Alternate path for the user

options.name: --threads
options.description:
Thread count, for instance 4
(int) or 2C/2.5C (int/float)
where C is core multiplied

options.name: --update-snapshots
options.description:
Forces a check for missing
releases and updated snapshots on
remote repositories

options.name: --update-plugins
options.description: Ineffective, only kept for

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information

options.name: --show-version
options.description:
Display version information
WITHOUT stopping build

options.name: --debug
options.description: Produce execution debug output
